channel.title: send tokens on 3ventures
channel.description: Recent content in send tokens on 3ventures

item.title: IBC Transfers from the CLI
item.description: When you’re interacting via the CLI client with different networks, you can use it for also sending tokens, just instead of using ${CHAINCOMMAND} tx bank send you should use ${CHAINCOMMAND} tx ibc-transfer transfer transfer channel-${CHANNEL}} ${TARGET} ${AMOUNT}${TOKEN} --from ${FROM}. Remember that you can check the appropriate channel number by visiting the chain explorer and checking the list of relaying channels.
